title: annona pygmaea
intro: Annona pygmaea, also known as the pygmy soursop, is a small evergreen tree native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Annona pygmaea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Annona pygmaea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
